segments.text: Indian students listen up. OpenAI has just launched an amazing new feature inside Chat GPT, a collection of 100 chats for college students. The best
part, these helpful prompts were created by students for students. This new tool is designed to help you ace every aspect of college life. You can use it to study
smarter by turning lecture notes into flashcards or simplifying complex topics. Under career, it helps you craft
the perfect resume and rehearse for job interviews. There's even a life hacks section for planning meals or understanding rental agreements. It's an incredible resource to help you learn,
plan, and navigate your college years with confidence. Explore it now on the Chad GPD website and subscribe to Full Disclosure for
